version.name: 0.53-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.53-beta : + Wwise Tool Optimization:Added a toggle for Perforce (P4) update functionality. Added dynamic size adjustment (UI/Window). Enhanced search logic. + Adaptive Regions: * New Feature launched. (Requires REAPER 7.62+) + New Action: * Added Adaptive "Duplicate Things" action. + Segment Switch: * Integrated Dynamic Split functionality. + Mirror: * Added Auto-Coloring for derived regions. (Requires REAPER 7.62+) + Miscellaneous: * Other minor UI/UX improvements and bug fixes.
-- Mantrika Team -- 2026-04.15
